SOURCE: 
CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) — derived 
FILE(S): 
Part D Beneficiary Auto-Assignment file 
VALUES: 
0–12 
COMMENT: 
The Medicare Modernization Act of 2003 (MMA) mandated that CMS establish the Low-Income 
Subsidy (LIS) program for the Medicare Part D benefit, which provides subsidies that reduce or 
eliminate Part D premiums and deductibles and offers zero or reduced co-payments for low-income 
beneficiaries. 
Beneficiaries who are eligible for the full LIS subsidy will
